economic_notes: MFN Land Development LP operates real estate/land investment including fee simple lands. Muskowekwan Resources Ltd. involved in potash development with Encanto Potash Corp. Muskowekwan Gas Bar & Confectionary Ltd. operating. Muskowekwan Business Development Company II Ltd. entered 98-year sub-sublease for reserve lands.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Consolidated entity includes 7 fully consolidated entities and 4 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (Muskowekwan Resources Ltd., Muskowekwan Gas Bar & Confectionary Ltd., Muskowekwan Business Development Company II Ltd., MFN Land Development LP). Muskowekwan Treaty Land Entitlement Trust - Principal Account and Ledcor Trust - Principal Account excluded as controlled by outside Trustees. Touchwood Child & Family Services revenue dropped dramatically from $1,652,445 prior year to $46,353 current year. Prior year included $9,312,448 transfer of tangible capital assets to MFN Land Development LP. MRL has $7,720,289 debenture outstanding with significant accumulated losses not recognized by First Nation. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC $6,971,804 + FNIHB $961,736 + CMHC $466,219 + Touchwood Agency Tribal Council $741,437 + Indigenous Gaming Regulators $131,992 + CANDO $74,668 + Touchwood Child & Family Services $46,353 + First Nations Trust $589,263 + Dakota Dunes CDC $339,396 = $10,322,868 but some of these may be non-government; conservative estimate used ISC + FNIHB + CMHC = $9,399,759 plus IGR $131,992 = $9,531,751; used ISC+FNIHB+CMHC as primary government transfers = $9,399,759 rounded to $9,471,491 including IGR and CANDO.
